data.title: Source One Staffing acquires TempsNow, expanding Midwest staffing reach. Deal boosts capabilities across manufacturing, logistics, and industrial sectors.
data.description: A recent acquisition has significantly improved capabilities in manufacturing, logistics, and industrial sectors. The acquisition involves Source One Staffing, a key provider of staffing solutions in these sectors, with a strong presence in Dallas/Fort Worth, Chicago, and other locations. The move is expected to bolster Source One Staffing's operations and influence in these sectors, consolidating their position as a leading player in the industry. This development comes amidst a dynamic market landscape, with increasing demand for specialized staffing services across various sectors.

data.title: Outlook POP users facing hangs after Windows 11 update, Stellar® PST Tool offers a solution. Issue traced to patch KB5074109.
data.description: After the release of the Windows 11 patch update KB5074109 on January 13, 2026, many users experienced freezing and hanging problems with classic Microsoft Outlook. In response to this widespread issue, a solution has been found in Stellar Repair for Outlook Software. This software presents a practical way forward for users encountering these issues. The incident has garnered attention since the update impacted a significant number of users, underscoring the need for effective solutions in ensuring smooth functionality of Microsoft Outlook post-Windows 11 update.

data.title: VASA Fitness opens 18th club in Aurora, Colorado, expanding access to affordable fitness. Grand opening on January 17.
data.description: A new VASA Fitness location is set to open in Aurora, Colorado at 1200 South Ironton Street, making it the third club in the city. The company is known for providing high-value, low-price fitness services and is committed to investing in Colorado communities. The opening of VASA Aurora (Havana Street) is scheduled for Saturday, January 17th, with festivities beginning at 8:00 am. This expansion will offer affordable, full-service fitness experiences to residents, contributing to the company's goal of increasing access to fitness facilities in the region.

data.title: $100,000 Comerica Hatch Detroit Contest by TechTown is back, supporting small businesses in the region. Applications now open.
data.description: Entries are currently being accepted for the 14th iteration of an entrepreneurial competition seeking to discover the next successful brick-and-mortar small business. This contest, known as the Comerica Hatch Detroit Contest by TechTown, has officially launched its application process. TechTown Detroit, in collaboration with Comerica Bank, has confirmed the return of this annual initiative. The competition aims to support the development and growth of small businesses. Interested participants can submit their applications for consideration. This marks the 14th year of the contest, further showcasing its longstanding success and impact in the entrepreneurial community. The contest provides a platform for entrepreneurs to showcase their innovative ideas and potentially secure resources to kickstart their ventures. With applications now open, aspiring business owners can seize this opportunity to compete for the top prize and gain recognition for their endeavors.

data.title: Cascades (CAS) to report Q4 & full year 2025 results on Feb 26, 2026. Conference call at 9:00 AM ET.
data.description: Cascades Inc., a company trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol CAS, is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 26, 2026. The announcement is scheduled before the market opens on that day, with a conference call planned for 9:00 AM Eastern Time to delve into the details of the results. This call will be available for interested parties to participate in and gain insight into the company's financial standing.

data.title: Alabama 334 area code to require 10-digit dialing starting Jan 23, 2026. New 483 area code to be implemented.
data.description: Montgomery, Alabama - The Alabama Public Service Commission has given the green light for the introduction of the 483 area code to supplement the existing 334 area code region. The 334 area code covers several major cities like Montgomery, Dothan, Auburn, Prattville, Phenix City, Enterprise, Opelika, Selma, and various smaller communities. Commencing January 23, 2026, all local calls within the 334 area code in Alabama must be dialed using 10 digits (area code + the 7-digit telephone number). The move comes in response to the rising demand for new telephone numbers in the region.

data.title: Wipro reports financial results for Q4 2025 under IFRS.
data.description: Wipro Limited released its financial results for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, following International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS). With headquarters in East Brunswick, N.J., and Bangalore, India, the company reported its performance driven by AI-powered technology.

data.title: ClickHouse secures $400M in Series D funding led by Dragoneer for expansion in analytics and AI infrastructure.
data.description: In San Francisco, ClickHouse, a prominent player in real-time analytics, data warehousing, observability, and AI/ML, proclaimed the completion of its Series D funding, securing $400 million. The funding round was spearheaded by Dragoneer Investment Group, supported by Bessemer Venture Partners, GIC, Index Ventures, Khosla Ventures, Lightspeed Venture Partners, accounts guided by T. Rowe Price Associates, Inc., and WCM Investment Management. This financing marks a significant step forward after experiencing a period of consistent and rapid growth.

data.title: Innovaccer and Hospitalogy release joint report on health systems' financial performance and AI opportunities, covering 2025 data.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Innovaccer Inc., a prominent healthcare AI company, and Hospitalogy, a healthcare research and intelligence firm, unveiled their collaborative report titled "Autonomous Healthcare is Here: The 2026 Health System Paradigm Shift." This 60-page report delves into the financial performance, operational strategies, and AI potential that are influencing the future of US health systems post-2025. Through a comprehensive analysis, the report examines data from 15 major health systems in the US, shedding light on the evolution of the healthcare landscape.

data.title: Protolabs (NYSE: PRLB) will report Q4 and FY 2025 results on Feb 6, 2026, followed by a conference call at 8:30 a.m. EST.
data.description: Protolabs (NYSE: PRLB) revealed plans to release its Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on February 6, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. EST on the same day to discuss these results. Interested parties can join a webcast of the call through a designated link on the Protolabs website. For participation in the live call, individuals can dial 877-709-8150 (U.S.) or access the international number provided.

data.title: Wildix highlights AI to transform UC&C channel at 2026 Summit, emphasizing partner-led execution for advisory services.
data.description: In Tallinn, Estonia, Wildix presented at the 2026 UC&C Summit, highlighting the role of AI and partner-driven strategies in transitioning the channel from traditional resale practices towards a more consulting-oriented approach focused on delivering specific outcomes.

data.title: Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM) declares $0.89 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on March 26, 2026.
data.description: San Diego-based Qualcomm Incorporated (NASDAQ: QCOM) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.89 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on March 26, 2026, to stockholders recorded as of March 5, 2026. Qualcomm is known for its continuous innovation in intelligent computing solutions, aiming to address global challenges. With over 40 years of technological expertise, the company strives to introduce groundbreaking advancements.

data.title: Zayo's $1.42 billion fiber securitization wins IFR "Deal of the Year" for North America ABS Issue in 2025.
data.description: Denver-based company Zayo, a top communications infrastructure provider, was recently honored for its first-ever $1.42 billion fiber securitization deal. International Financing Review (IFR) declared this transaction as the "Deal of the Year" for 2025, specifically awarding it the North America ABS Issue award. IFR, a renowned capital markets publication focusing on worldwide debt, equity, and structured finance markets, noted the exceptional structure and execution of Zayo's transaction in granting the prestigious accolade.

data.title: 78% of Executives believe AI drives revenue growth, while 61% see inflation and interest rates as revenue decline.
data.description: Alexander Group, a leading global go-to-market consultancy, released findings from its 2026 study on Innovating Customer Engagement with AI. Their research surveyed commercial executives, showing that 78% believe AI is boosting revenue growth. In comparison, 61% attributed revenue decline to inflation and interest rates, while 45% identified industry competition as a driving factor for revenue decrease.

data.title: Unstructured receives $1M DAF DTO contract to develop AI data layer for GenAI at tactical edge.
data.description: Unstructured has secured a significant contract worth $1 million from the Department of the Air Force Digital Transformation Office in Sacramento, California. Their task involves creating a strong data foundation for generative AI applications within the DAF. This initiative aims to support the US Air Force in implementing secure and efficient Generative AI solutions for crucial functions like operational planning and decision support. The project emphasizes the importance of maintaining complete data ownership throughout the process.

data.title: SAFFA invests $30M in SAF One project starting construction in 2026, with $10M already funded.
data.description: A $30 million investment has been made by SAFFA Fund I, LP and SAF One Energy Management Limited for a sustainable aviation fuel project. Managed by Burnham Sterling Asset Management LLC, SAFFA aims to speed up SAF production. $10 million of the investment has already been funded, with the project set to commence in 2026 in Dubai.

data.title: SPX Technologies (NYSE: SPXC) to release Q4 and 2025 full-year financial results on February 24, 2026. financial guidance for 2026 will also be presented.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - SPX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:SPXC) disclosed today its plan to unveil its financial performance figures for the fourth quarter and entirety of fiscal year 2025 after the closure of U.S. financial markets on Tuesday, February 24, 2026.

data.title: Global memory chip shortage deepens in early 2026 due to AI-driven demand, affecting supply chains. Memory chipmakers enjoy fully booked order books and soaring margins amidst AI data explosion. AI demand for high-margin chips is crowding out production of conventional components, leading to long-term supply-demand imbalance. Chipmakers shift focus to high-bandwidth memory chips for AI data centers.
data.description: The global memory chip shortage is worsening in early 2026 due to robust demand driven by artificial intelligence. Oxford Economics revealed that the shortage is significantly impacting global supply chains, especially electronics, electrical machinery, and automakers relying on traditional DRAM and NAND chips. On the other hand, memory chip manufacturers are benefiting from fully booked order books and soaring margins. The insatiable AI-driven demand for advanced memory chips is outpacing the production of conventional components used in PCs, smartphones, and consumer electronics. Makoto Tsuchiya, a senior economist at Oxford Economics, anticipates the supply-demand imbalance to persist in the next few years as long as the AI boom continues. Manufacturers are redirecting production capacity towards higher-margin AI chips, reducing capacity for traditional memory chips. Chipmakers are striving to meet the heightened demand for high-bandwidth memory chips crucial for AI data centers.

data.title: Rio Hotel workers in Las Vegas, represented by Teamsters Local 986, ratify 4-year contract, avoiding strike. 62 employees.
data.description: Las Vegas casino workers at the Rio Hotel and Casino, who are members of Teamsters Local 986, have successfully negotiated and ratified a robust four-year collective bargaining agreement. The 62 employees involved in the deal threatened to strike but ultimately reached a favorable agreement. The new contract ensures labor stability and includes key provisions for the workers' benefits, wages, and working conditions.

data.title: French company discloses total 106,756,604.80 euros capital, 632 012 100 shares, and based in Paris with LEI 529900JI1GG6F7RKVI53.
data.description: A French public limited company, known as Société anonyme, has a registered capital of approximately 106,756,604.80 euros. Their registered office is located at 14, Rue Royale, 75008 Paris. The company is listed under the RCS Paris number 632 012 100 and possesses a Legal Entity Identifier with the code 529900JI1GG6F7RKVI53.
